tool_name: Pressure Vessel Wall Thickness & MAWP — Cylindrical & Spherical Shell Design

inputs.name: Design Internal Pressure (P)
inputs.uncertainty_source: ISO 286-1:2010 §4 — Design specification nominal, zero measurement uncertainty

inputs.name: Shell Inside Diameter (D_i)
inputs.uncertainty_source: ISO 286-1:2010 IT5 — Precision grinding tolerance: 4-18µm (≈0.5% for Ø10-50mm)

inputs.name: Material Allowable Stress at Design Temp (S)
inputs.note: ASME BPVC II-D: SA-516-70 at 38°C → S=138 MPa; SA-240-316L → S=115 MPa
inputs.uncertainty_source: IEC 61298-2:2008 §4.2 — Transducer accuracy class 1.0: ±1% of span

inputs.name: Weld Joint Efficiency Factor (E)
inputs.note: E=1.0: full RT; E=0.85: spot RT; E=0.70: no RT — ASME VIII UW-12
inputs.uncertainty_source: ISO 2768-1:1989 — Nominal/material selection, no measurement uncertainty

inputs.name: Shell Geometry
inputs.uncertainty_source: ISO 2768-1:1989 — Nominal/material selection, no measurement uncertainty

inputs.name: Design Temperature
inputs.uncertainty_source: ISO 286-1:2010 §4 — Design specification nominal, zero measurement uncertainty

inputs.name: Mill Undertolerance (MT)
inputs.note: ASME B36.10M: 12.5% standard mill undertolerance for plate

formulas: P_mpa = design_pressure_bar * 0.1; t_circ_mm = (shell_geometry === 'cylindrical') ? (P_mpa * inside_diameter_mm / 2) / (allowable_stress_mpa * weld_joint_efficiency - 0.6 * P_mpa) : (P_mpa * inside_diameter_mm / 2) / (2 * allowable_stress_mpa * weld_joint_efficiency - 0.2 * P_mpa)   // [mm] Required Wall Thickness — Circumferential Stress (t_circ_mm) Reference: ASME BPVC VIII Div.1 UG-27(c)(1) — cylindrical; UG-27(d) — spherical

t_nominal_mm = (t_circ_mm + corrosion_allowance_mm) / (1 - mill_undertolerance_pct / 100)   // [mm] Nominal Required Thickness (incl. CA + mill tolerance) Reference: ASME BPVC VIII UG-16(b) — minimum ordered thickness

t_eff_mm = t_nominal_mm * (1 - mill_undertolerance_pct/100) - corrosion_allowance_mm; MAWP_bar = (shell_geometry === 'cylindrical') ? (allowable_stress_mpa * weld_joint_efficiency * t_eff_mm) / (inside_diameter_mm/2 + 0.6*t_eff_mm) : (2 * allowable_stress_mpa * weld_joint_efficiency * t_eff_mm) / (inside_diameter_mm/2 + 0.2*t_eff_mm)   // [bar(g)] Maximum Allowable Working Pressure — Cylindrical (MAWP) Reference: ASME BPVC VIII UG-27 rearranged for MAWP
Dt_ratio = inside_diameter_mm / t_nominal_mm   // [dimensionless] Pressure-Thickness Product (D/t Ratio) Reference: Thin-wall criterion: D/t > 20 validates membrane stress approach
safety_factor = MAWP_bar / design_pressure_bar   // [dimensionless] MAWP Safety Factor vs Design Pressure Reference: ASME BPVC VIII UG-99: hydrostatic test at 1.3× MAWP
P_test_bar = MAWP_bar * 1.3   // [bar(g)] Hydrostatic Test Pressure Reference: ASME BPVC VIII UG-99(b) — 1.3× MAWP at ambient temperature

standards: ASME BPVC VIII Div.1 (UG-27, UG-99, UW-12)

V1.error_msg: D/t < 20: thick-wall condition — use Lamé equations per ASME VIII Div.1 Appendix 1-2; membrane formula is non-conservative

V2.error_msg: Temperature > 425°C: verify material allowable includes creep derating per ASME BPVC II-D Table 1A

V3.error_msg: MAWP < design pressure: vessel underdesigned — increase wall thickness or reduce operating pressure

smart_warnings.message: MAWP within 5% of design pressure: no inspection margin — increase nominal thickness by minimum 10%
smart_warnings.source: ASME BPVC VIII Div.1 (UG-27, UG-99, UW-12)

smart_warnings.message: High-pressure service with reduced joint efficiency: full radiographic testing (RT) strongly recommended — E=1.0 reduces wall thickness requirement
smart_warnings.source: ASME BPVC VIII Div.1 (UG-27, UG-99, UW-12)

smart_warnings.message: Low corrosion allowance at elevated temperature: enhanced inspection frequency required per API 510
smart_warnings.source: ASME BPVC VIII Div.1 (UG-27, UG-99, UW-12)

smart_warnings.message: Sub-zero service: impact testing mandatory per ASME BPVC VIII UCS-66 — verify MDMT (Minimum Design Metal Temperature)
smart_warnings.source: ASME BPVC VIII Div.1 (UG-27, UG-99, UW-12)

smart_warnings.message: D/t < 10: ultra-thick wall — membrane stress theory invalid; perform finite element or Div.2 Part 5 analysis
smart_warnings.source: ASME BPVC VIII Div.1 (UG-27, UG-99, UW-12)

smart_warnings.message: Large-diameter high-pressure vessel: wind/seismic loading and nozzle reinforcement analysis required per ASME UG-37
smart_warnings.source: ASME BPVC VIII Div.1 (UG-27, UG-99, UW-12)

fmea.effect: D/t < 20: thick-wall condition — use Lamé equations per ASME VIII Div.1 Appendix 1-2; membrane formula is non-conservative
fmea.control_measure: Input validation — automatic BLOCK on violation

fmea.effect: Temperature > 425°C: verify material allowable includes creep derating per ASME BPVC II-D Table 1A
fmea.control_measure: Input validation — automatic BLOCK on violation

fmea.effect: MAWP < design pressure: vessel underdesigned — increase wall thickness or reduce operating pressure
fmea.control_measure: Input validation — automatic BLOCK on violation

fmea.failureMode: MAWP within 5% of design pressure: no inspection margin — increase nominal thickness by minimum 10%
fmea.control_measure: ASME BPVC VIII Div.1 (UG-27, UG-99, UW-12)

fmea.failureMode: High-pressure service with reduced joint efficiency: full radiographic testing (RT) strongly recommended — E=1.0 reduces wall thickness requirement
fmea.effect: Smart warning triggered when: weld_joint_efficiency < 1.0 && design_pressure_bar > 100
fmea.control_measure: ASME BPVC VIII Div.1 (UG-27, UG-99, UW-12)

fmea.failureMode: Low corrosion allowance at elevated temperature: enhanced inspection frequency required per API 510
fmea.effect: Smart warning triggered when: corrosion_allowance_mm < 1.5 && design_temp_c > 200
fmea.control_measure: ASME BPVC VIII Div.1 (UG-27, UG-99, UW-12)

fmea.failureMode: Sub-zero service: impact testing mandatory per ASME BPVC VIII UCS-66 — verify MDMT (Minimum Design Metal Temperature)
fmea.control_measure: ASME BPVC VIII Div.1 (UG-27, UG-99, UW-12)

fmea.failureMode: D/t < 10: ultra-thick wall — membrane stress theory invalid; perform finite element or Div.2 Part 5 analysis
fmea.control_measure: ASME BPVC VIII Div.1 (UG-27, UG-99, UW-12)

fmea.failureMode: Large-diameter high-pressure vessel: wind/seismic loading and nozzle reinforcement analysis required per ASME UG-37
fmea.effect: Smart warning triggered when: inside_diameter_mm > 1500 && design_pressure_bar > 50
fmea.control_measure: ASME BPVC VIII Div.1 (UG-27, UG-99, UW-12)
